Device identifier for the source device generating the log; used for entity alignment and device grouping.
Timestamp of the log event in the format "YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS"; used for temporal alignment and event correlation.
Device name of the log source; used for identifying the device type or model in entity alignment.
Numeric code representing the type or category of the log; used for log classification and filtering.
Priority level of the log event; used for severity-based event correlation and triage.
Software version identifier of the log source; used for version alignment and compatibility analysis.
Module or subsystem name that generated the log; used for event grouping and process lineage tracking.
Source IP address from which the administrative action originated; used for network linkage and origin identification.
Administrator username performing the action; used for user entity alignment and session grouping.
Action or command performed by the administrator; used for event correlation and activity-based grouping.
Display message captured from the terminal output; used for descriptive event context and payload analysis.
Outcome or status of the action (e.g., success or failure); used for result-based event correlation and auditing.
Flag or identifier indicating whether the log is related to firewall logging; used for log type filtering and alignment.
